items.name: ✨Stylish Off-Shoulder Kimono Yukata Shirt Golden
items.description:
✨Stylish Off-Shoulder Kimono Yukata Shirt-Golden!!!

An elegant off-shoulder kimono-inspired top featuring wide, flared sleeves and intricate brocade patterns. Accented with a structured obi-style waist and decorative fasteners, this design blends traditional Eastern fashion with a soft, modern silhouette. Ideal for fantasy, imperial, or ceremonial looks.
